prompt: Create a highly detailed vertical anime-style fantasy illustration of a young noble painter girl seated in a sunlit glass conservatory studio, shown from a high three-quarter angle while painting at an easel. She has very long flowing silvery white hair with soft lavender-blue shadows, partly covering her shoulders, and her face is intentionally hidden by a centered flat pale-lavender square censor block. She wears an elegant deep midnight blue gothic-lolita dress with glossy satin folds, white lace cuffs, layered ruffles, silver chains, and large sapphire jewel ornaments. Add two prominent hair accessories: one large navy ribbon with an ornate silver filigree sapphire brooch and dangling blue gems on the left side of her hair, and one matching sapphire brooch bow at her chest. She holds a thin paintbrush in her right hand near the canvas, with her left hand touching the wooden easel. The easel holds a square canvas painting of a luminous fairytale castle surrounded by hydrangeas, roses, irises, and glowing butterflies, in the same blue-purple floral palette. Surround her with a dreamy atelier environment: tall window panes behind her, soft morning light, bokeh, glass vases of flowers, scattered hydrangeas, and a small wooden side table holding exactly 8 glass paint jars in blue, cyan, silver, pink, lavender, and clear tones. Include exactly 12 glowing butterflies: 3 inside the painted canvas, 4 around the window and background, 3 around the girl's dress and hair, and 2 large blurred foreground butterflies near the lower right and lower left edges. Use a rich cool sapphire blue, lavender, white, and pale pink palette, sparkling highlights, smooth polished fabric rendering, delicate linework, ornate jewelry, luminous particles, shallow depth of field, and a magical ethereal atmosphere. No text, no watermark, no extra characters, keep the composition portrait-oriented with the girl occupying the left and center and the easel canvas on the right.
